ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parts" (
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each part */,
  "part_name" TEXT /* Name of the part */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the part */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the part */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the part */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the part */,
  "part_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the part */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the part */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the part */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Last inspection date of the part */,
  "inspection_interval" INTEGER /* Inspection interval of the part */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the supplier's website or documentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parts_part_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_type_id") REFERENCES part_types ("part_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parts_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the supplier */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the supplier */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the supplier */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the supplier */,
  "primary_contact" TEXT /* Primary contact person */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Credit limit for the supplier */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms for the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the part used in the equipment */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Installation date of the equipment */,
  "warranty_expiration_date" TEXT /* Warranty expiration date of the equipment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the equipment is installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Last maintenance date of the equipment */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Next scheduled maintenance date of the equipment */,
  "maintenance_interval" INTEGER /* Maintenance interval of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_types" (
  "part_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each part type */,
  "part_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the part type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the part type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the part type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_specifications" (
  "specification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the part */,
  "specification_name" TEXT /* Name of the specification */,
  "specification_value" TEXT /* Value of the specification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_specifications_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_configurations" (
  "configuration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment */,
  "configuration_date" TEXT /* Date of the configuration */,
  "configuration_description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who made the configuration change */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the configuration change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("configuration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_configurations_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_configurations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the part */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the part in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the part */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the part */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Last date the part was reordered */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for the part */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the part */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the order */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "receipts" (
  "receipt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each receipt */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "receipt_date" TEXT /* Date the receipt was received */,
  "quantity_received" INTEGER /* Quantity received */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number from the supplier */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date of the invoice */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the receipt */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the receipt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("receipt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_receipts_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who performed the maintenance */,
  "estimated_time" INTEGER /* Estimated time for the maintenance activity */,
  "actual_time" INTEGER /* Actual time for the maintenance activity */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "parts_used" TEXT /* Parts used during the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the equipment */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date of the status update */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the current status */,
  "estimated_resolution_date" TEXT /* Estimated resolution date */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who updated the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_status_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_status_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supplier_lead_times" (
  "lead_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lead time entry */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the part */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lead_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_lead_times_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_lead_times_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_reorder_points" (
  "reorder_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reorder point entry */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the part */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point quantity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reorder_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_reorder_points_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id")
)
